product.description: Discover this divine Haagen-Dazs Mango & Raspberry Swirl Ice Cream pint. A real treat for your senses.

metaData.Ingredients:
Ice Cream (88%), Cream (31%)
• Mango Puree (20%): Mango Puree (61%), Sugar, Water, [Thickener: Pectin (E440)], Condensed Skimmed Milk, Sugar, Water, Egg Yolk, Concentrated Orange Juice, (Natural Flavouring Substance: Mango, Concentrated Lemon Juice)
• Raspberry Sauce (12%): Raspberry Puree (40%), Sugar, Water, Concentrated Blackberry Puree, [Thickener: Pectin (E440)], Concentrated Lemon Juice, (Natural Flavouring Substance: Raspberry)
metaData.Key Information:
• 100% fresh dairy in every pint
• Delicious tropical mango ice cream combined with sweet colourful swirls of raspberry sauce
• No artificial ingredients, stablizers, emulsifiers nor colours
• 5 simple ingredients in the vanilla ice cream and the base for all flavours
• Takes fifteen seconds to melt a spoonful of the ice cream

product.description: How can something so small, pack so much fun?! Well, it seems some clever (and a bit silly) guys at Cornetto thought it would be cool to shrink all the Cornetto fun into mini size! The crispy cone! Check. The yummy ice cream? Check. The chocolate plug? Double check! But giving just one Cornetto Mini wouldn't be fair! So we've made a multi-pack of delicious Chocolate and Vanilla flavours for you to share the fun with friends and family (or not!). Share it with Cornetto Mini!

metaData.Ingredients:
Chocolate Ice Cream with Chocolate Topping and Peanuts: Wafer Cone, Chocolate Flavoured Coating, Sugar, Chocolate Topping, Milk Solids (Skimmed Milk Powder, Whey Protein Concentrate, Whey Powder), Vegetable Oil (Coconut Oil, Palm Oil), Glucose Syurp, Roasted Peanuts, Cocoa Powder
• Contains: Wheat, Soy Lecithin, Peanuts and Milk
• Contains: Permitted Stabilisers (INS 410, INS 407, INS 412), Emulsifier [(INS471 - Plant Origin) and Flavouring] Substances of Plant and Synthetic Origin
Vanilla Ice Cream with Chocolate Topping and Peanuts: Wafer Cone, Chocolate Flavoured Coating, Sugar, Chocolate Topping, Milk Solids (Skimmed Milk Powder, Whey Protein Concentrate, Whey Powder), Glucose Syrup, Vegetable Oil (Coconut Oil, Palm Oil), Roasted Peanuts
• Contains: Wheat, Soy Lecithin, Peanuts and Milk
• Contains: Permitted Stabilisers (INS 410, INS 407, INS 412), Emulsifier (INS 471 - Plant Origin) and Flavouring Substances of Plant and Synthetic Origin
metaData.Key Information: Consists of Cornetto Mini Ice Cream - Chocolate (6 x 28ml) and Cornetto Mini Ice Cream - Vanilla (6 x 28ml).

metaData.Ingredients:
Classic [Ice Cream with Vanilla from Madagascar coated with Milk Chocolate (33%)]:
Reconstituted Skimmed Milk, Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Water, Coconut Oil, Glucose Syrup, Whole Milk Powder, Glucose- Fructose Syrup, Whey Solids (Milk), Butter Oil (Milk), Emulsifiers (Soybean Lecithin, E476, E471), Exhausted Vanilla Bean Pieces, Stabilisers (E407, E410, E412), Natural Vanilla Flavouring (with Milk), Flavouring, Colour (E160a)

Reconstituted Skimmed Milk, Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Water, Coconut Oil, Skimmed Milk Powder, Almonds, Glucose Syrup, Butter Oil (Milk), Glucose-Fructose Syrup, Whey Solids (Milk), Cocoa Mass, Emulsifiers (E442, E476, E471), Exhausted Vanilla Bean Pieces, Stabilisers (E407, E410,E412), Natural Vanilla Flavouring (with Milk), Flavouring, Colour (E160a)
• May contain: Soy and other nuts
White [Ice Cream with Vanilla from Madagascar coated with White Chocolate (31%)]:
Reconstituted Skimmed Milk, Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Coconut Oil, Whole Milk Powder, Glucose Syrup, Glucose-Fructose Syrup, Butter Oil (Milk), Whey Solids (Milk), Skimmed Milk Powder, Emulsifiers (E442, E476, E471), Exhausted Vanilla Bean Pieces, Stabilisers (E407, E410, E412), Natural Vanilla Flavouring (with Milk), Flavouring, Colour (E160a)
